name: Kinyarwanda
note: TTS uses multilingual fallback (fr-FR closest). STT via Whisper multilingual model.

tts.note: Native Kinyarwanda TTS not yet available in Web Speech API. Uses French voice with Kinyarwanda text or transliteration.

stt.note: Whisper supports Kinyarwanda in the multilingual model. Use whisper-medium or larger for best accuracy.

ui.confirm_critical: Iyi ni igikorwa cy'ingenzi mu gikino cy'ubuvuzi. Uremeza ko ushaka gukomeza? Vuga yego cyangwa oya.
ui.confirm_dangerous: Iburyo: Iri gikorwa rishobora kugira ingaruka nkuru. Tafadhali fikiria kabla ya kuendelea. Vuga yego guemeza.
ui.escalating: Nohesheje iri bwiye ku Mutware w'ishami kugira ngo yemeze. Azamenyeshwa nonaha.
ui.escalated: Icyifuzo cyoheshejwe ku Mutware w'ishami. Tegereza igisubizo cye mbere yo gukomeza.
ui.escalation_blocked: Iri gikorwa ryarahagaritswe. Umuyobozi w'ishami yaramenyeshejwe.
ui.persist_warning: Ukomeje kugira iri gikorwa. Ngombwa ngo ndamenyeshe umuyobozi w'ishami wawe.
ui.offline_mode: Sisitemu ikorana mu buryo bw'offline. Serivisi za mbere ziraboneka.
ui.error: Habaye ikosa. Ongera ugerageze cyangwa utumanahana na superivizeri wawe.
ui.unauthorized: Ntufite uburenganzira bwo gukora iyi mirimo.
ui.serial_verified: Umwirondoro wemejwe. Ubu ushobora kuvuga itegeko ryawe.
ui.slow_mode_on: Uburyo bwo kuvuga bugufi burakoze. Nzavuga buhoro.
ui.accessibility_on: Uburyo bw'ibumoso burakora. Nzavuga buhoro cyane n'ibikorwa.
